title: MODstore deploy topology
description: Logical deploy units (services/components) and preferred rollout relationships. This is infrastructure semantics — do not encode AI employee pack collaboration here (use manifest depends_on / collaboration.depends_on instead).

description.description: Human-readable scope for this topology document.

repo_paths.description: Monorepo paths owned by this component (documentation aid).

ci_workflow_name.description: GitHub Actions workflow `name:` for component CI (must match .github/workflows).

deploy_workflow_name.description: GitHub Actions workflow `name:` for deploy job if applicable.

edges.description: Directed edges between component ids. Must form a DAG.

from.description: Upstream component id (deploy/provision before `to` when kind implies ordering).

kind.description: rollout_order: preferred sequence; health_gate: gate before continuing; soft_dependency: documentation-only coupling.
